messages.message: Dr Hector-Goma, congratulations on your 60th birthday. God bless your new age. As your days so shall your strength be. I want appreciate God’s grace on your marriage. It’s been 30 years of God’s blessings and mercy. God is good and more grace to you and to our dear sister Dupe for the years ahead together. Happy anniversary. And we look forward to celebrating decades of God’s favours with you in years and decades to come. 🙏❤️
messages.name: Pastor Bunmi and Jumoke Omodeinde

messages.message: We have known Dr Ibiye Goma for almost 2 decades now. We strongly align with the kind words and testimony of everyone at 60-30 party on the 29th December,  2025. He is a wonderful gentleman with a big heart. Sis Dupe is a perfect fit for Dr Ibiye. Congratulations to both of you. We are blessed for knowing you.
messages.name: Tayo & Ronke

messages.message: Congratulations to your 60-30 celebration of life together. With love and affection we wish you and the family a day full of thanksgiving, laughter, health, and joy, celebrating the journey, wisdom and experiences that come with HBD age 60 yrs (Dr Abiye) and marriage 30 yrs with Modupe. The LORD continue to bless your union in Jesus name Amen. Amaopusenibo Prof Mike Sonny❤️🌹🍾🎁🥂🙏
messages.name: Amaopusenibo Prof MS & Mrs Ngozi Ijoma Sonny

messages.message: Thank you Hector for inviting me and my family to share your special day, and look forward to celebrating with you, your wife, family and friends.
messages.name: Ralph D'Attorre

messages.message:
My name is Dr. Olateju Jinadu. I'm sending these message from Australia. 



I have known dalasis, that is what I call him since 1983 when we were medical students, I'm very sure that only pleasant and brilliantly beautiful things will be said about you and Dupe today. Not only because people love to say good things in occasions like this, but in this case that is really who you are. 



You have a good heart -That is actually bigger than your body. Don't laugh. 



Your heart is full good things, you love people. I mean, all people you love service to God, your family, colleagues and your community. This is reflected in the number of active philanthropic organisations you founded together and that you have continued to fund. 



So I was confused. And I didn't know which of them to send my small donation to because yeah, they are all good ones, but, you know, we got talk the donation thing in the way we usually do am, I'm sure you know.

Your family openly receives all people to your home (see "glasnost" in action). 



If you know, you know, my daughter, Dr Kenny Jinadu, was a beneficiary of this openness and she's there today, representing my family at this wonderful occasion  

However, there is an equally pleasant soul working and walking side by side with you in all of this- let us give a shout out to- you modupe - my sister. And that is detribalised Dallasis for you. I have asked Hecto several times -What time do you ask for my sister? 



Because Dallas is everywhere in the world, all the time, either celebrating or helping to organise some events for individuals, families or organisation safelessly, or he is keeping late nights, doing endless things for people, community, doing health talks and so on and so on, hence i have nicknamed several decades ago as "Kerosene" -I know you will laugh- that needs decoding - if you know, you know? Well, we joyfully welcome you to climbing the 6th floor today and we celebrate your God blessed wife and beautiful children for 30 years of what a happy God family should look like. 
I refer you to exodus 23 vs 25 to 26 because your life is full of service. Happy born day - Dallas is my colleague, my friend and my brother. God bless you and all yours.



Dr. Olateju Jinadu.
messages.name: Dr Olateju Jinadu

messages.message: I have known Dallasis, since 1983 as medical students then. I am very sure that only pleasant and brilliantly beautiful things will be said about you and Dupe, not only because people love to say good things in occasions like this but in this case that is really who you are. You have a good heart, that is actually bigger than your body (laugh). You love people, I mean all people, you love service- to God, family, colleagues and community- this is reflected in the number of active Philanthropic organisations you have founded together and that you have continued to fund. I was confused and didn’t know which of them to send my donation. We go talk the donation tin the way you and me dey talk am- Abi. Your family openly receives all people to your home-see pure glasnost in action- My daughter Dr Kenny Jinadu was a beneficiary and she is there today representing my family at this wonderful event. However, their is an equally pleasant soul, working and walk side-by-side with you - Modupe my sister -abi -that is detribalised Dallasis. I have asked Hector several times-what time do you have for my sister because Dallas is every where in the world - either celebrating or helping to organised events for individuals or organisations selflessly or keeping late nights doing endless things for people, community, health talk etc etc-hence I call him “Kerosene never sleeps”- if you know you know. Well we celebrate climbing to the 6th floor today, and we celebrate your God blessed wife and beautiful children for a 30 years of what a happy God ordained family should look like -Exodus 23 vs 25 -26. Happy born-day Dallasis, my colleague, friend and brother.
messages.name: Olateju Jinadu

messages.message:
Happy 30th Wedding Anniversary to you both, and a joyful 60th birthday celebration!
 
Today marks not just a milestone of years but a beautiful testimony of love, partnership, strength, and unwavering commitment. Your journey together continues to inspire everyone privileged to know you.

I want to take a moment to say something from the deepest part of my heart: thank you. Many years ago, your kindness changed the direction of my life in a moment when I felt I had run out of options. At a time when I was almost homeless with a newborn and a five-year-old, you stepped in with generosity, compassion, and love—helping me secure a roof over our heads and giving us the safety and stability we desperately needed. I will never forget that. You didn’t just offer help; you restored hope.

As you celebrate 30 years of marriage—three decades of grace, love, and unity—and as we rejoice with you on this special 60th birthday, I pray your home continues to overflow with peace, joy, health, laughter, and God’s enduring blessings. May the years ahead be even more beautiful than all the years behind you.

Thank you for being a shining example of what true love, true friendship, true kindness and leadership look like.
I celebrate you both today and always.

With gratitude,
Esther
messages.name: Esther Sample

messages.message:
Congratulations Abiye and Dupe on this joyful celebration of your 30th wedding anniversary and Abiye’s 60th birthday 🎉. It will be a beautiful celebration by God’s grace. 

We thank God for His goodness and faithfulness over your life and family and we rejoice with you all💃🎉. 

We pray the Lord’s goodness and mercy continue to follow you and yours, all the days of your lives In Jesus Christ name amen🙏🏽 🎉
messages.name: Uche and Rita Okpala n Family

messages.message:
I bless God on behalf of Dr & Dr Mrs Abiye and family 
May the almighty father continue watch over both of you and also continue to preserve your home and your family IJMN 
Thank you for all you do 
 Have a beautiful celebration my lovely fam 🎉🥰😘🥂🍾Cheers to many more years to IJMN 🙏🏼🙏🏼🙏🏼
messages.name: Funky Femi- Phillips

messages.message: Happy 60th Birthday and 30th Wedding Anniversary! These are truly remarkable milestones, and I’m delighted to celebrate them with you. Wishing you many more joyful birthdays ahead and a lifetime of continued love and happiness together.
messages.name: Victoria Ajayi

memories.caption: Dr. Abiye came all the way from Leeds to Newcastle Upon Tyne to join us in the Christening of our daughter Tamunoseimieibi Abam. It was really beautiful surprise to see him, making out time to join us and stay until later before leaving, even leaving a huge gift for our daughter. It was a kindness that we as a family do not in anyway take for granted. We will be forever grateful. Dr. Abiye has inspired and touched a lot of lives, ours included. We pray that you live to celebrate more birthdays and anniversaries with your beautiful wife and family. Thank you so much Sir, opu miebaka.
memories.name: Gloria and Joshua Abam

memories.caption:
Dallas and Miss Kay!



Sorry I can’t be with you guys as you celebrate the milestone birthday and an amazing union. E pain me pass as I fit describe. 



I’m there in spirit and with AI assistance, we’re dancing and I’m celebrating you both. 

I wish you many more years of bliss, good health and joy.
memories.name: Patrick-Spencer Salami
